changes.value:
File: swissarmyhammer-embedding/src/embedder.rs (17.7% coverage, 31/175 lines)

Uncovered functions:
- Embedder::default() and from_model_name() - model resolution and backend selection (lines 57-133)
- backend_name(), model_name(), max_sequence_length() - accessors (lines 136-152)
- TextEmbedder impl: load(), embed_text(), embedding_dimension(), is_loaded() (lines 160-195)
- embed_single() and embed_chunked() - single vs chunked embedding with mean-pooling (lines 197-280)

This is the main embedding facade. Testing from_model_name() requires either a real model on disk or mocking ModelManager. The chunk-and-pool logic in embed_chunked() is independently testable."
Test embedding Embedder construction and TextEmbedder delegation
